taylor-williams.female_specific_note: Taylor Williams Coaching focuses on female-specific HRT/peptide guidance. Per-peptide notes here often emphasize female dosing, fertility, hormone interactions.

reset_biology_synthesis.recommendation: Reset Biology suggests asking the practitioner to consider Selank for anxiety, mood stability, and nervous-system 'downshift' — Hunter (199d026a6dd3eb61 2025-10-10): "The tool here is Selank (or N-Acetyl Selank Amidate if you need more oomph). Dose ~1 mg once or twice daily (nasal or subQ). Selank modulates GABAergic tone and helps the system 'downshift' out of fight-or-flight"; Taylor (2m6fKa4Wd6k 00:08:34.829): "sank is going to be super beneficial because it's going to help with the immune system" and (2m6fKa4Wd6k 00:08:54.590): "celink actually enhances Gaba." We'd ask the prescribing physician to weigh dose range and route because Hunter and Taylor differ on milligram-level dosing — Hunter (199d026a6dd3eb61): "Dose ~1 mg once or twice daily" vs Taylor (2m6fKa4Wd6k 00:12:56.550): "200 to 600 micrograms." Hunter (19c06d9325e3862f 2026-01-28): "Semax + Selank — neurotrophic signaling (BDNF/TrkB) + immune/cytokine modulation. Don't require gender dosing" — but Taylor surfaces female-specific use cases worth flagging.
reset_biology_synthesis.caveats:
- Dose disagreement (mcg vs mg): Hunter (199d026a6dd3eb61 2025-10-10): "Dose ~1 mg once or twice daily (nasal or subQ)." Taylor (2m6fKa4Wd6k 00:12:56.550): "my dosing with sank is again very similar to cmax it's going to be 200 to 600 micrograms" — never average; surface both.
- Foundation-first hedge: Hunter email threadId 195b0718ac68bbb2 (2025-03-19): "If you're neglecting journaling, no amount of selank, semax, or cerebrolysin will fully optimize your brain health. Start journaling consistently, THEN invest in peptides."
- Therapy adjunct, not replacement: Hunter (199d026a6dd3eb61 2025-10-10): "Trauma healing is layered. Peptides don't replace therapy, but Selank often takes the edge off enough for the body to unlearn the contraction pattern."
- N-Acetyl variant note: Hunter (199d026a6dd3eb61 2025-10-10): "Selank (or N-Acetyl Selank Amidate if you need more oomph)" — surface as patient-specific escalation, not default.
- Trevor Bachmeyer signal absent — no Trevor citations exist in current corpus for Selank; chronic-vs-acute frame derived from Hunter+Taylor only.
- No baseline_protocol — Hunter's 2023 Hunter+Jay cheat sheet does not include Selank, so dosing floor anchors to the 2025-10-10 Q&A, not a 2023 protocol.
reset_biology_synthesis.cross_expert_consensus: Both speakers position Selank as anxiety-modulating via GABA. Hunter (199d026a6dd3eb61 2025-10-10): "Selank modulates GABAergic tone and helps the system 'downshift' out of fight-or-flight." Taylor (2m6fKa4Wd6k 00:08:54.590): "celink actually enhances Gaba so Gaba is going is a neurotransmitter that helps promote relaxation to the brain." Both endorse intranasal as a viable route. Hunter (199d026a6dd3eb61): "Dose ~1 mg once or twice daily (nasal or subQ)." Taylor (2m6fKa4Wd6k 00:13:05.230): "it is definitely usually done as a internasal spray similar to cink but I have done sub cute injections with um celink and it works great." Both place Selank in the cognitive/nootropic family alongside Semax. Hunter (19c112a2709941b7 2026-01-30): "Cerebrolysin alternatives: P21, PE-22-28, Selank, Semax." Taylor (2m6fKa4Wd6k 00:01:27.270): "selank and seax are both going to be cognitive enhancing peptides and support um mood stability they work on the neuropath way transmitters of the brain."
reset_biology_synthesis.cross_expert_disagreement: Dose magnitude differs by ~3-5x. Hunter (199d026a6dd3eb61 2025-10-10): "Dose ~1 mg once or twice daily (nasal or subQ)" — i.e. 1000-2000 mcg/day. Taylor (2m6fKa4Wd6k 00:12:56.550): "my dosing with sank is again very similar to cmax it's going to be 200 to 600 micrograms" and (2m6fKa4Wd6k 00:13:02.629): "I take this anywhere between one to three times a day" — i.e. 200-1800 mcg/day, with her personal practice clustering at the lower end. NO averaging. Route preference also differs — Hunter (199d026a6dd3eb61): "nasal or subQ" presented as equivalent options. Taylor (2m6fKa4Wd6k 00:13:19.990): "I have my preference I do prefer this peptide in an inner nasal spray just because like when that anxiety starts coming on I just feel like the inner nasal sprays are a little quicker." Gender-dosing framing differs — Hunter (19c06d9325e3862f 2026-01-28): "Semax + Selank — neurotrophic signaling (BDNF/TrkB) + immune/cytokine modulation. Don't require gender dosing," while Taylor (2m6fKa4Wd6k 00:17:30.750): "my lit phase of my menstrual cycles are tough… I definitely will use slink during my Ludo phase of my cycle especially if I'm having to be social" — Taylor surfaces a cycle-phase use pattern even though Hunter says no gender-specific dose adjustment is needed.

acute.dose: Hunter (199d026a6dd3eb61 2025-10-10): "Dose ~1 mg once or twice daily (nasal or subQ)"; Taylor (2m6fKa4Wd6k 00:12:56.550): "200 to 600 micrograms" used "one to three times a day" (2m6fKa4Wd6k 00:13:02.629), with Taylor (2m6fKa4Wd6k 00:14:10.189): "if I'm struggling really bad one day with anxiety I definitely have used this peptide more than once a day like this is definitely one that I've used up to three times a day."
acute.route: Taylor (2m6fKa4Wd6k 00:13:19.990): "I do prefer this peptide in an inner nasal spray just because like when that anxiety starts coming on I just feel like the inner nasal sprays are a little quicker"; Hunter (199d026a6dd3eb61 2025-10-10): "nasal or subQ."
acute.frequency: Taylor (2m6fKa4Wd6k 00:14:21.629): "if I wake up and I feel just the anxiety and stress coming on like I will take this in the morning and then if I still kind of feel that kind of creeping back in around the afternoon I'll take it again"; Hunter (199d026a6dd3eb61 2025-10-10): "once or twice daily."
acute.verbatim_citation: Hunter (199d026a6dd3eb61 2025-10-10): "The tool here is Selank (or N-Acetyl Selank Amidate if you need more oomph). Dose ~1 mg once or twice daily (nasal or subQ)." Taylor (2m6fKa4Wd6k 00:14:10.189): "if I'm struggling really bad one day with anxiety I definitely have used this peptide more than once a day like this is definitely one that I've used up to three times a day."

chronic.dose: Taylor (2m6fKa4Wd6k 00:12:56.550): "200 to 600 micrograms" — Taylor's daily-maintenance frame; Hunter does not separately split chronic from acute and the only Hunter dose on record is the 1 mg Q&A.
chronic.route: Taylor (2m6fKa4Wd6k 00:13:05.230): "it is definitely usually done as a internasal spray similar to cink but I have done sub cute injections with um celink and it works great."
chronic.frequency: Taylor (2m6fKa4Wd6k 00:13:02.629): "I take this anywhere between one to three times a day um it is definitely usually done as a internasal spray"; Taylor (2m6fKa4Wd6k 00:07:38.629): "I like to use it more I like to use it once a day if I needed to use it more than once a day I absolutely would."
chronic.verbatim_citation: Taylor (2m6fKa4Wd6k 00:12:56.550): "my dosing with sank is again very similar to cmax it's going to be 200 to 600 micrograms and I take this anywhere between one to three times a day um it is definitely usually done as a internasal spray."

reset_biology_synthesis.female_specific_notes: Taylor frames Selank as particularly relevant to women juggling 'content switching.' Taylor (2m6fKa4Wd6k 00:10:34.790): "as women content switching we're always content switching whether we're going from being in work mode you know house mode mom mode wife mode spouse mode whatever it is like we are women are constantly contact soci and that can be very stressful on the body." Taylor (2m6fKa4Wd6k 00:10:57.430): "I think that's one of the biggest things why one of the biggest factors of why women have anxiety… the link is going to be a really great option if you are struggling with anxiety." Cycle-phase use: Taylor (2m6fKa4Wd6k 00:17:30.750): "my lit phase of my menstrual cycles are tough… I definitely will use slink during my Ludo phase of my cycle especially if I'm having to be social." Counterpoint from Hunter (19c06d9325e3862f 2026-01-28): "Semax + Selank — neurotrophic signaling (BDNF/TrkB) + immune/cytokine modulation. Don't require gender dosing" — Hunter explicitly says no female-specific dose adjustment; Taylor's signal is timing/symptom-context, not dose magnitude.
